proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`, after accounting for lineage, culture, screen covariates, and other molecular features.

Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `egfr_amplification=0`, after accounting for lineage, culture, screen covariates, and other molecular features.

Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=0`, after accounting for lineage, culture, screen covariates, and other molecular features.

Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `kras_mutation=0`, after accounting for lineage, culture, screen covariates, and other molecular features.
Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss=0`, consistent with RAS-pathway rewiring producing RIT1 dependency.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: dependency_BRAF ~ all binary features + standardized continuous features + C(lineage) + C(lineage_subtype) + C(culture_type) + C(screen_batch).
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `braf_v600e` was -0.5543, indicating substantially more negative BRAF dependency in BRAF V600E lines.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with the same full main-effect covariate set.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `egfr_amplification` was -0.3492, supporting amplified-EGFR-specific dependency.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with the same full main-effect covariate set.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `erbb2_amplification` was -0.4327, supporting amplified-ERBB2-specific dependency.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with the same full main-effect covariate set.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `kras_mutation` was -0.3097, supporting mutant-KRAS-specific dependency.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with the same full main-effect covariate set.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `nf1_loss` was -0.0954 for `dependency_RIT1`, a smaller but highly significant dependency signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores, reflecting stronger dependency on core transcriptional machinery in faster-growing lines.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores, but the effect is expected to be weaker than for `dependency_POLR2A`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores, suggesting a proliferation-linked DHX9 dependency component.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model with standardized `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted per-SD growth-rate coefficient for `dependency_POLR2A` was -0.0614, the largest growth-rate effect among the dependency outcomes.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model with standardized `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted per-SD growth-rate coefficient for `dependency_TMED10` was -0.0203. This supports a small growth-linked effect, not a large subgroup-specific dependency.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model with standardized `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted per-SD growth-rate coefficient for `dependency_DHX9` was -0.0215, supporting a modest proliferation-linked DHX9 effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `lineage=colorectal` cell lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal lines after adjustment for molecular and screen covariates.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `apc_mutation=0`, after adjustment for lineage and other covariates.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `wnt_activity_score` is associated with more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores after adjustment for lineage, APC status, and other covariates.
Cell lines with `smad4_loss=1` have less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `smad4_loss=0` after adjustment, suggesting SMAD4 loss suppresses the KIF18A dependency state.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model; coefficient for `C(lineage)[T.colorectal]` relative to the reference lineage.
analyses.result_summary: The colorectal-lineage coefficient was -0.3714, identifying colorectal lineage as the dominant KIF18A-associated lineage state.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `apc_mutation` was -0.1221, supporting APC-associated KIF18A dependency independent of lineage main effects.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model with standardized `wnt_activity_score`.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted per-SD WNT coefficient was -0.0288 for `dependency_KIF18A`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `smad4_loss` was +0.0938, meaning SMAD4-loss lines were less KIF18A-dependent after covariate adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative effect of `apc_mutation=1` on `dependency_KIF18A` is stronger in `lineage=colorectal` lines than in non-colorectal lines, giving a negative `apc_mutation` by `lineage=colorectal` interaction.
The negative effect of `apc_mutation=1` on `dependency_KIF18A` becomes stronger as `wnt_activity_score` increases, giving a negative `apc_mutation` by standardized `wnt_activity_score` interaction.
Within `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, high-`wnt_activity_score` cell lines, `smad4_loss=1` lines have less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than `smad4_loss=0` lines.

The complete high-dependency KIF18A subgroup is `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, `wnt_activity_score>=0.821`, and `smad4_loss=0`; this subgroup has much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other validation-set lines.

analyses.code: Feature-by-feature interaction screen: residualized `apc_mutation * lineage_colorectal` interaction after all main effects.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `apc_mutation` by `lineage=colorectal` interaction coefficient was -0.6814, confirming strong lineage-specific amplification of APC-associated KIF18A dependency.

analyses.code: Feature-by-feature interaction screen: residualized `apc_mutation * wnt_activity_score_z` interaction after all main effects.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `apc_mutation` by WNT interaction coefficient was -0.2159 per SD of WNT, confirming WNT-enabled KIF18A dependency.

analyses.code: Validation split subgroup comparison within `apc_mutation=1 & lineage=colorectal & wnt_activity_score>=0.821`.
analyses.result_summary: Within the APC-mutant colorectal high-WNT validation subgroup, `smad4_loss=1` lines had mean KIF18A dependency -0.2372 versus -1.3128 for `smad4_loss=0`; the signed difference was +1.0756, confirming suppression by SMAD4 loss.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test of the complete four-predicate subgroup chosen after interaction/subgroup discovery.
analyses.result_summary: In validation, the complete subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.3128 versus -0.2553 in all other validation lines (n=1295), effect -1.0574.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `copy_number_8q24` is associated with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores, consistent with MYC/8q24-linked ribosomal dependency.

Among `myc_amplification=1` cell lines, the subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965` and `ploidy>=3.068` has more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other `myc_amplification=1` lines.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` is associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores after adjustment for screen covariates and other molecular features.

The subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965`, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.674`, and `rnaseq_AXL_log2_tpm<=2.372` has more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other validation-set lines.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model with standardized `copy_number_8q24`.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted per-SD `copy_number_8q24` coefficient for `dependency_RPL11` was -0.0558.

analyses.code: Validation split comparison within `myc_amplification=1` lines.
analyses.result_summary: Among MYC-amplified validation lines, high-growth/high-ploidy lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.4219 versus -0.3556 in other MYC-amplified lines; effect -0.0663.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS full main-effect model with standardized `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted per-SD MYC-expression coefficient for `dependency_DHX9` was -0.0170.

analyses.code: Held-out validation subgroup comparison using discovery-set quartile thresholds.
analyses.result_summary: The high-growth/high-MYC/low-AXL validation subgroup had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3973 versus -0.3346 in all other validation lines (n=419), effect -0.0627.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within `braf_v600e=1` cell lines, concurrent `kras_mutation=1` makes `dependency_BRAF` more negative beyond additive main effects.
Within `egfr_amplification=1` cell lines, higher `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` makes `dependency_EGFR` more negative beyond additive main effects.
Within `erbb2_amplification=1` cell lines, `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched` makes `dependency_ERBB2` more negative beyond additive main effects.
Within `kras_mutation=1` cell lines, concurrent `pik3ca_mutation=1` makes `dependency_KRAS` more negative beyond additive main effects.
Within `nf1_loss=1` cell lines, concurrent `egfr_amplification=1` makes `dependency_RIT1` less negative beyond additive main effects.

analyses.code: Driver-by-modifier interaction screen for `dependency_BRAF`; p_value is BH-adjusted q-value across screened modifiers.
analyses.result_summary: The `braf_v600e * kras_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.0204, but it was not significant after interaction-screen FDR correction (raw p=0.0968, q=0.897).

analyses.code: Driver-by-modifier interaction screen for `dependency_EGFR`; p_value is BH-adjusted q-value across screened modifiers.
analyses.result_summary: The `egfr_amplification * rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm_z` interaction coefficient was -0.0155, but it was not significant after FDR correction (raw p=0.0087, q=0.374).

analyses.code: Driver-by-modifier interaction screen for `dependency_ERBB2`; p_value is BH-adjusted q-value across screened modifiers.
analyses.result_summary: The `erbb2_amplification * lineage_subtype_her2_enriched` interaction coefficient was -0.0632, but it was not significant after FDR correction (raw p=0.0496, q=0.618).

analyses.code: Driver-by-modifier interaction screen for `dependency_KRAS`; p_value is BH-adjusted q-value across screened modifiers.
analyses.result_summary: The `kras_mutation * pik3ca_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.0057 and not significant after FDR correction (raw p=0.537, q=0.981).

analyses.code: Driver-by-modifier interaction screen for `dependency_RIT1`; p_value is BH-adjusted q-value across screened modifiers.
analyses.result_summary: The `nf1_loss * egfr_amplification` interaction coefficient was +0.0454, but it was not significant after FDR correction (raw p=0.0251, q=0.846).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The final BRAF dependency subgroup is `braf_v600e=1`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all validation-set lines with `braf_v600e=0`.
The final EGFR dependency subgroup is `egfr_amplification=1`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all validation-set lines with `egfr_amplification=0`.
The final ERBB2 dependency subgroup is `erbb2_amplification=1`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all validation-set lines with `erbb2_amplification=0`.
The final KRAS dependency subgroup is `kras_mutation=1`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all validation-set lines with `kras_mutation=0`.
The final RIT1 dependency subgroup is `nf1_loss=1`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all validation-set lines with `nf1_loss=0`.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup search with even/odd split: discovery screened single, pair, and selected triple predicates; validation tested the final subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: In validation, `braf_v600e=1` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8051 versus -0.2512 in other lines (n=2846), effect -0.5539.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: In validation, `egfr_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.5923 versus -0.2552 in other lines (n=1970), effect -0.3371.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: In validation, `erbb2_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6846 versus -0.2539 in other lines (n=2416), effect -0.4308.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: In validation, `kras_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5575 versus -0.2525 in other lines (n=5839), effect -0.3051.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: In validation, `nf1_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3633 versus -0.2599 in other lines (n=2273), effect -0.1034.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The final KIF18A dependency subgroup is `apc_mutation=1`, `lineage=colorectal`, `wnt_activity_score>=0.821`, and `smad4_loss=0`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other validation-set lines.
For `dependency_TMED10`, validation-set lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965` have slightly more negative scores than slower-growing validation-set lines.

For `dependency_TMED10`, the candidate multi-feature subgroup `cas9_activity_score>=1.08`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965`, and `mutation_burden<=3.25` has more negative scores than all other validation-set lines.

The final DHX9 dependency subgroup is `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965`, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.674`, and `rnaseq_AXL_log2_tpm<=2.372`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other validation-set lines.
The final POLR2A dependency subgroup is `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than slower-growing validation-set lines.

Within `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965` validation-set lines, `cdkn2a_loss=1` and `aneuploidy_score<=0.257` further strengthens `dependency_POLR2A`, making scores more negative than other high-growth lines.

The final RPL11 dependency subgroup is `myc_amplification=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.965`, and `ploidy>=3.068`; these validation-set lines have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other validation-set lines.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup and interaction discovery.
analyses.result_summary: The final KIF18A subgroup had mean -1.3128 versus -0.2553 in all other validation lines (n=1295), effect -1.0574.

analyses.code: Held-out validation comparison using the discovery-set Q3 growth threshold.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth validation lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2780 versus -0.2474 in slower lines (n=6229), effect -0.0306. The effect was significant but small.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test of the best multi-feature TMED10 subgroup from systematic search.
analyses.result_summary: The candidate TMED10 multi-feature subgroup had mean -0.2855 versus -0.2545 in other validation lines (n=412), effect -0.0310, but it did not reach p<0.05 in validation.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: The final DHX9 subgroup had mean -0.3973 versus -0.3346 in all other validation lines (n=419), effect -0.0627.

analyses.code: Held-out validation comparison using the discovery-set Q3 growth threshold.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth validation lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4963 versus -0.3893 in slower lines (n=6229), effect -0.1069.

analyses.code: Within-high-growth validation comparison for the best extra POLR2A modifiers found in subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: Within high-growth validation lines, the `cdkn2a_loss=1 & aneuploidy_score<=0.257` subgroup differed from other high-growth lines by only -0.0112, not significant.

analyses.code: Held-out validation test after systematic subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: The final RPL11 subgroup had mean -0.4219 versus -0.2680 in all other validation lines (n=309), effect -0.1539.
